title: geranium sessiliflorum var. typicum
intro: Geranium sessiliflorum var. typicum, also known as Sessile-Flowered Geranium, is a variety of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Geranium sessiliflorum var. typicum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tincture or infusion, and can also be used in topical applications such as creams and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
